"""Representation helpers used by the WMS-Prep Pyodide bridge.

The frontend and the browser-side geometry tools already use the same
representation convention.  This module keeps only the axis-order logic needed
to rotate raw Gaussian tensor components before they are projected to Watson
constants.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

REP_MAP = {
    "Ir": ("a", "b", "c"),
    "IIr": ("b", "c", "a"),
    "IIIr": ("c", "a", "b"),
    "Il": ("a", "c", "b"),
    "IIl": ("b", "a", "c"),
    "IIIl": ("c", "b", "a"),
}

AXES = ("a", "b", "c")


def normalize_representation_token(token: object, default: str = "Ir") -> str:
    raw = str(token or "").strip()
    if not raw:
        return default
    for candidate in REP_MAP:
        if candidate.lower() == raw.lower():
            return candidate
    return default


def inverse_representation_token(token: object, default: str = "Ir") -> str:
    rep = normalize_representation_token(token, default)
    axes = REP_MAP[rep]
    inverse = [None, None, None]
    for index, axis in enumerate(axes):
        inverse[AXES.index(axis)] = AXES[index]
    inverse_tuple = tuple(inverse)
    for candidate, candidate_axes in REP_MAP.items():
        if candidate_axes == inverse_tuple:
            return candidate
    return default


def build_axis_remap(input_representation: object, output_representation: object) -> dict[str, object]:
    rep_in = normalize_representation_token(input_representation)
    rep_out = normalize_representation_token(output_representation)
    axes_in = REP_MAP[rep_in]
    axes_out = REP_MAP[rep_out]
    principal_to_input_axis = {
        axes_in[0]: "a",
        axes_in[1]: "b",
        axes_in[2]: "c",
    }
    return {
        "inputRepresentation": rep_in,
        "outputRepresentation": rep_out,
        "axisOutToIn": {
            "a": principal_to_input_axis[axes_out[0]],
            "b": principal_to_input_axis[axes_out[1]],
            "c": principal_to_input_axis[axes_out[2]],
        },
    }


def rotate_abc_values(
    values: object,
    input_representation: object,
    output_representation: object,
) -> dict[str, object] | None:
    if not isinstance(values, dict):
        return None
    rep_out = normalize_representation_token(output_representation)
    principal = {
        "a": values.get("A"),
        "b": values.get("B"),
        "c": values.get("C"),
    }
    axes_out = REP_MAP[rep_out]
    return {
        "A": principal.get(axes_out[0]),
        "B": principal.get(axes_out[1]),
        "C": principal.get(axes_out[2]),
    }


def rotate_triplet(
    values: object,
    input_representation: object,
    output_representation: object,
) -> dict[str, object] | None:
    if not isinstance(values, dict):
        return None
    rep_out = normalize_representation_token(output_representation)
    axes_out = REP_MAP[rep_out]
    return {
        "a": values.get(axes_out[0]),
        "b": values.get(axes_out[1]),
        "c": values.get(axes_out[2]),
    }
